hooks.command: dir="${CODEX_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; if [ -f "$dir" ]; then dir=$(dirname "$dir"); fi; dir=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P) || exit 0; while :; do if [ -d "$dir/.frontload" ]; then exec frontload hook pre-tool-use --host codex; fi; parent=$(dirname "$dir"); if [ "$parent" = "$dir" ]; then exit 0; fi; dir="$parent"; done

dir="${CODEX_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; if [ -f "$dir" ]; then dir=$(dirname "$dir"); fi; dir=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P) || exit 0; while :; do if [ -d "$dir/.frontload" ]; then exec frontload hook post-tool-use --host codex; fi; parent=$(dirname "$dir"); if [ "$parent" = "$dir" ]; then exit 0; fi; dir="$parent"; done
